infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FieldNotes uses the camera so you can attach a photo to a journal entry.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FieldNotes needs photo library access so you can pick an existing photo for an entry.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FieldNotes can tag an entry with your current location.

plugins.photosPermission: FieldNotes needs photo library access so you can pick an existing photo for an entry.
plugins.cameraPermission: FieldNotes uses the camera so you can attach a photo to a journal entry.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FieldNotes can tag an entry with your current location.
